description: Protected memory-specific holdout queries for Feature 016/012. Proposer/search runs must not see this split; use only for memory regression and promotion gates.

queries.message: Use my corrected preference from the latest memory: risk sizing answers must be verbatim-first with source refs, not summary-only. Do not store a new preference.
Recall my current maximum correlated exposure rule and explain where the evidence came from. Do not update or overwrite it.
If the answer depends on my personal trading history, use personal memory; do not substitute global KG or RAG facts for my own stored preference.
